message:
feat(api): add complex tensor construction, STFT/ISTFT, affine_grid, and grid_sample

Add signal processing and spatial transformer operations:

- tensor_complex: construct Complex64/Complex128 from real+imag parts
  with automatic dtype promotion for mixed f32/f64 inputs
- tensor_view_as_real / tensor_view_as_complex: lossless roundtrip
  conversion between complex and real-with-trailing-2 representations
- hann_window: periodic and symmetric Hann window generation
- tensor_stft / tensor_istft: short-time Fourier transform and its
  inverse for 1-D real signals, supporting configurable hop_length,
  win_length, center padding, normalization, and onesided modes
- tensor_affine_grid: generate sampling grids from affine matrices
  (align_corners true/false)
- tensor_grid_sample: bilinear and nearest spatial sampling with
  zeros, border, and reflection padding modes

Supporting types: StftOptions, IstftOptions, GridSampleMode,
GridSamplePaddingMode, GridSamplePlan, IstftReconstructPlan.

All operations fail-closed on autograd-requiring inputs. Includes 20
new tests covering construction, roundtrip fidelity, known-value DFT
verification, and input validation error paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
